info.title: AMM — Agent Memory Manager
info.description: REST API for the Agent Memory Manager. Provides durable, structured memory for AI agents.

post.description: Streamable HTTP endpoint for JSON-RPC MCP requests.

get.description: Serve the Swagger UI index page.

post.description: Initialize database if needed and return current status.
Append a single raw event to history.

Update privacy level for an existing memory.

post.description: Run retrieval with configurable mode and filters.
Return thin descriptions for multiple IDs.

get.description: Expand memory, summary, or episode to full detail.
Assemble deterministic context from summaries and fresh events. At least one of session_id or project_id is required.
Search events and group matches by covering summary.
